text: - on every user turn (`UserPromptSubmit`/turn-start hook), the daemon hands the *live conversation transcript* to an LLM (via `rig`, OpenRouter/Ollama, or shelling to the local `claude` CLI) which returns a stable session **TITLE** + a live **NOW** line in one call (`src/distill.rs`) — this becomes the agent's broadcast "what I'm doing" [...] Verbs: **spawn**, **launch**, **invite**, **mention**, **distill**, **materialize**, **reattach / supersede / mint** (session identity), **admit / quarantine** (NIP-29 membership gate), **publish / relay**.
